collected.policy_snippet: When you use our voice, image and camera services, we use your voice input, images, videos, and other personal information to respond to your requests, provide the requested service to you, and improve our services.
collected.purpose: to respond to your requests, provide the requested service to you, and improve our services.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy lists broad categories of data collection such as 'Automatic Information' and 'Information from Other Sources' without specifying concrete limits on the volume or type of physical data collected beyond functional necessity.

stored.policy_snippet: We receive and store any information you provide in relation to Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: to provide and continually improve our products and services.

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: You can review and delete Alexa voice recordings, text transcripts of those recordings, and typed requests to Alexa associated with your Amazon account by visiting More > Alexa Privacy in the Alexa app and Echo Show devices or https://www.amazon.com/alexaprivacysettings.

shared.policy_snippet: We share customers' personal information only as described below and with subsidiaries Amazon.com, Inc. controls that either are subject to this Privacy Notice or follow practices at least as protective as those described in this Privacy Notice.
shared.purpose: to perform functions on our behalf

physical_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Amazon collects significant amounts of physical data including voice recordings, images, videos, and location data. This information is stored and shared with third-party service providers and subsidiaries. Deletion is available but often requires manual user action or specific configuration.

collected.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
collected.purpose: to provide and continually improve our products and services

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy states data is collected to 'provide and continually improve our products and services' which is a generic claim without concrete limits on the scope or volume of behavioral data collected.

stored.policy_snippet: We automatically collect and store certain types of information about your use of Amazon Services, including information about your interaction with products, content, and services available through Amazon Services.
stored.purpose: to provide and continually improve our products and services

retention_policy.policy_snippet_deletion: In addition, to the extent required by applicable law, you may have the right to request access to or delete your personal information.

shared.policy_snippet: Third-Party Service Providers: We employ other companies and individuals to perform functions on our behalf. Examples include fulfilling orders for products or services, delivering packages, sending postal mail and email, removing repetitive information from customer lists, analyzing data, providing marketing assistance
shared.purpose: perform functions on our behalf such as analyzing data

behavioral_data.overall_privacy_risk_description: Amazon collects extensive behavioral data including clickstream, search history, and interaction logs to improve services and personalize ads. This data is shared with third-party service providers and advertisers, and may be transferred internationally under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
